results.overview: The film explores prayer as a real force and the community that can sustain a person when they can no longer cope. The story revolves around the extraordinary journey of Michał Ulewiński, who travels almost 650 kilometers across Poland, carrying a 15-kilogram cross. The route—from the Vistula Lagoon to Giewont, then through Gniezno to Sokółka—forms the symbolic sign of the cross on the map of Poland. This is not just a physical endeavor. It is an intense, personal prayer, a spiritual struggle, and a process of profound inner transformation.

Drawing from personal archives, home videos, street protests footage, newspapers, and recorded voices, she retraces more than 40 years of Iran’s history. From the early days of 1979, until the war that began in 2026, she pieces together intimate and collective memories, forming the portrait of a country shaped by political repression and in constant hope for a revolution.

results.title: Between the scenes, between the voices. Unseen footage of the future sound of Slovakia.
results.original_title: Medzi scénami, medzi hlasmi. Nevidené zábery budúceho zvuku slovenska.
results.overview: In 2024, during an artistic residency at Periférne Centrá (Dúbravica, Slovakia), Cristian Estrella filmed the folkumentary „Medzi dolinami, medzi vŕški, po stopách budúceho zvuku Slovenska“ while producing the album "The Future Sound of Slovakia Vol.1" by Mira Tus Manos. But every film leaves scenes out. What doesn't fit due to time, rhythm, or because the main story needs to go elsewhere.  "Medzi scénami, medzi hlasmi" is exactly those outtakes: already edited material that no one had seen, divided into two parts —SIDE A and SIDE B— where artists from Argentina, England, France, Catalonia, Amsterdam, New Zealand, and Slovakia speak not only about the project but also about their own artistic practices, personal stories, and internal maps.

As fans and colleagues mistake her for her fictional alter-ego, stripping her of her individuality, she enters an internal struggle to reclaim her essence, challenging the limits between fiction and the reality of her own existence and fighting to take control of her destiny before disappearing completely under the shadow of her character.

results.title: Giappone, dai samurai ai manga

The legendary tradition of the samurai, the heroes of manga and anime with whom generations of young people have grown up, the highly refined cuisine, cutting-edge technology, the delicacy of cherry blossoms, the horror of kamikaze attacks and seppuku, and the natural disasters from which to defend oneself. An intimate portrait of an author able to transform the observation of the real in an universal emotion and reveals the modernity of a gaze which keeps on illuminating cinema and our way of seeing the world.

It also accompanies the scientific expeditions that for 11 years have tried to unveil the secrets of these giants and to know if their recent presence is linked to global warming and rising water temperatures around the Azores.

results.title: Loving Karma
results.overview: Loving Karma ifollow-up to the Emmy Award–winning documentary Tashi and the Monk. Set in the remote Himalayan foothills of Arunachal Pradesh, India, the film retells the original story in a newly reversioned ‘Directors Cut’ and then expands on the journey of Tashi, a spirited young girl who was once one of the most troubled children at Jhamtse Gatsal Children’s Community.

results.title: Remind(h)er
results.overview: A girl goes about her daily life, using post-it notes as reminders, but when they start to disappear can she cope with her system falling apart?

results.title: Almost There
results.overview: When a long-awaited family celebration puts everything on the table, a guarded woman must confront her fear of disappointing those she loves-and stop hiding who she is.

results.title: The Auntie Sewing Squad Resistance Playbook
results.original_title: The Auntie Sewing Squad Resistance Playbook
results.overview: A feature documentary about the Auntie Sewing Squad, a grassroots collective founded by performance artist Kristina Wong in March 2020 during the COVID-19 pandemic. As PPE shortages spread across the U.S., hundreds of volunteers—mostly BIPOC women, along with Uncles and non-binary members—turned their homes into sewing hubs producing cloth masks for vulnerable communities and essential workers. The group quickly grew from a few dozen activists into a nationwide network of more than 800 volunteers. Beyond providing masks, the collective used mutual aid to support historically marginalized communities and openly discuss feminism, anti-racism, allyship, and resistance to systemic inequality.

results.title: Views
results.overview: Does everyone react the same way to a piece of information? What factors influence a person’s perspective? Could this be used against us?

results.title: Diwata
results.overview: With her twilight years on the horizon, a Filipina grandmother ditches her eightieth birthday party to summon the spirit of her long-dead granddaughter, navigating repressed memories as she attempts to make amends with her past.

results.title: IX XI
results.overview: Twelve unique individuals recount their lives leading up to and during the tragic events of 9/11. As everyday New Yorkers, their narratives embody the impact the attacks had on the millions of people who call this city home.

results.title: Playing with Fire: An Immersive Odyssey with Yuja Wang
results.original_title: Playing with Fire: An Immersive Odyssey with Yuja Wang
results.overview: Through the fire of Yuja Wang's piano performance, step inside a surreal human odyssey — a multisensory mixed reality concert where music takes shape before your eyes.

results.title: Lucid
results.overview: Mia, an art student who is on the verge of being expelled from school, finds her last hope for combating her creative block in a magical lucid dreaming elixir. But in addition to awakening her creativity, the potion also unleashes a number of dark monsters that inhabit her subconscious, one of which is her mother, who appears transformed into a hairy creature that Mia will be forced to confront.

results.title: The Shed
results.overview: Víctor and Daniela, a young couple with a baby, are trapped in poverty. Víctor, trapped in a cycle of alcohol abuse, sees an easy, effortless solution in a mysterious pen shed that promises to fulfill his desires at no apparent cost: all he has to do is go inside, imagine his riches, and the next day they’ll be waiting right at his doorstep.

results.title: (another) Perfect Film
results.overview: "A lot of film is perfect left alone, perfectly revealing in its un- or semi-conscious form. I wish more stuff was available in its raw state, as primary source material for anyone to consider, and to leave for others in just that way, the evidence uncontaminated by compulsive proprietary misapplied artistry, 'editing', the purposeful 'pointing things out' that cuts a road straight and narrow through the cine-jungle; we barrel through thinking we're going somewhere and miss it all. Better to just be pointed to the territory, to put in time exploring, roughing it, on our own.” - Ken Jacobs

results.title: How Not To Try Again
results.overview: After five years of radio silence, Indigo's best friend waltzes back into her life. With no more than 35p to her name, no job, and an incredibly destructive impulse to make everything too perfect, Indigo battles her final chance to save her friendship.

results.title: Black Trumpet
results.overview: After 10 years of living abroad, the famous writer Maksim Grahovac returns to his birthplace, the Montenegrin village of Grahovo, with the intention of visiting his brother and agreeing on the estate that was left to them as an inheritance.

results.title: Once Upon A Time, We Loved
results.overview: In 2006, 18-year-old Bảo spends the final summer of his youth with his closest friends in a quiet coastal town, surrounded by unfinished dreams and endless possibilities. The arrival of Quỳnh—a worldly and emotionally complex woman—awakens feelings he has never experienced before, pulling him out of the safe orbit of his ordinary life. Their passionate romance soon triggers a chain of irreversible events, beginning with a death that changes everything. Twenty years later, the echoes of that summer still linger in silence. Can Bảo truly understand love—and finally forgive himself?

results.title: The Yellow One
results.overview: After an event known as the great invasion, wipes out most of the human population, James is forced to become bait for a particularly type of alien. However, things don't go as planned as he finds out the most dangerous variant of these aliens comes to visit him. .

results.title: It's Time to Grow Up
results.overview: In a secluded castle, Margaret, a highly sensitive young girl, lives peacefully with her mother, Helen. On the evening of her twentieth birthday, Helen invites Margaret's grandmother, Agatha, for dinner. As the sun sets and the young girl lies on a tablecloth in the garden, a phrase written in an open notebook beside her, once whispered by her grandmother, suddenly catches her attention: "It's Time to Grow Up".

results.title: A Message
results.overview: A Message is a short-form documentary draft capturing the raw, unmediated protests and performances of queer Palestinian artist Mama Ganuush while facing pink washing propaganda. Created by trans Palestinian artist Mama Ganuush, this film rejects the flattening narrative of tragedy. Instead, it posits Palestinian Futurism - a framework where those in exile are not merely survivors, but the architects of a liberated cultural and political future.

results.title: I Do Not See When Shooting
results.original_title: Як добре, що ми їх не бачимо
results.overview: Two friends drift through Kyiv’s »yebenya« (Ukrainian slang: »the ass-end of nowhere«), hopping city trains, tracing smokestacks, and power lines of Ukraine’s wounded electrical grid, chatting about the (in)ability to cry.

results.title: Nurture
results.overview: On a remote Oregon farm, a couple grieving from a miscarriage finds hope in a mysterious flower. But as it heals her, the flower takes root in him. Nurture is a dialogue-free folk-horror fable about love, grief, and the consequences of taking too much from nature.

results.title: Withering Hellebore
results.overview: Bronte battles a giant monster who is keeping tortured souls

results.title: Lo Naveena
results.overview: A rustic village boy and his wild friends embark on a chaotic, heartwarming quest to win the heart of his beloved Asha.

results.title: Autumn 2026
results.overview: In the latest edition of his poetic series, Wojciech Sobczyk reimagines our ideas and fantasies about this season to create a captivating, sensual, and at times unsettling audiovisual poem. From images of the changing autumn landscape, the animator extracts a universal tale of human nature and man’s place and role in the world.

results.title: Saksi Tengah Malam
results.overview: In a small home laundry, Asih is forced to fight for survival when two killers break into her house after she accidentally witnesses their murder.

results.title: GREED
results.overview: A group of young students resort to a grand heist to pay off their student debts, will they be successful or succumb to greed?

results.title: Yekokebu Sew
results.overview: New theater

results.title: Under Exposed
results.overview: Follows the life of Lucy Parks, a college photographer that is desperate to find a way to expand her clientele. Her financial trauma, and desperation to take risks, ultimately change everything.

results.title: King Of The Forest - Ras Tanura
results.overview: King of The Forest , a children's comedy musical play, was held in Ras Tanura on May 28 & 29, 2026

results.title: King Of The Forest - Ras Tanura
results.overview: King of The Forest , a children's comedy musical play, was held in Ras Tanura on May 28 & 29, 2026

results.title: The Nature of the End
results.overview: Trapped in a mysterious and unpredictable space, a man struggles to understand where he is and why. When voices begin to emerge from behind a curtain, the line between memory, judgment, and reality starts to dissolve.

results.title: I Am Ryan
results.overview: A Ryan Reynolds look-alike named Bryan and his cunning manager, Henry, take Hollywood by storm in all the wrong ways. As Henry profits from his client's striking resemblance to the actor, Bryan stumbles through red carpets, celebrity events and mounting mayhem, completely unaware of the madness surrounding him.

results.title: Sitsit
results.overview: Sometimes… you shouldn’t answer back.

results.title: The Tropic Sun and His Eyes
results.original_title: The Tropic Sun and His Eyes
results.overview: Traveling on foot, a young man returns to Haiti to reconnect with his estranged father. When a persistent street kid won’t stop following him, Ruben makes a deal: help him find a shortcut, keep some distance, and the boy can stay.

results.title: The Lorraine
results.overview: Renowned documentarian Sam Pollard tells the astonishing, inspiring story of the Lorraine Motel in Memphis, Tennessee, site of the assassination of Reverend Martin Luther King, Jr., and its remarkable owners, Walter and Loree Bailey.

results.title: A Secret Heart
results.overview: Over the last 4 years, Lilou left her secret life behind, becoming a 64-year-old woman who enjoys DIY, gardening, cycling and looking after her grandchildren. As I accompanied her through her transformation, I filmed a family healing its wounds and reinventing a place for everyone. This is my family, Lilou is my father.

results.title: Katha Na Ma A U
results.original_title: คาถา นะ มะ อะ อุ
results.overview: After mysteriously disappearing from his wealthy family’s estate, a young boy seeks refuge in a small rural village with new friends. What first appears to be a peaceful community soon reveals a dark secret: a deceptive cult leader and her followers are manipulating the villagers through black magic, and false promises.

results.title: Stone and Feather
results.overview: Nazire, in order to take back her child who was sent to an orphanage, puts up a tough fight against both the bureaucratic system that offers her child conditions she cannot overcome, and the rich foster family who wants to adopt her child.

results.title: Hundred-Proof
results.overview: An office clerk meets a god in a bar who assists him in reuniting with a lost love

results.title: The Misfired Affair
results.overview: On the American home front during WWII, a new career leads Evelyn Gardner into a world of hidden violence and quiet defiance. After tracking a silent witness to a remote motel, Evelyn finds herself captivated by a life she wasn’t prepared to protect. As the investigation turns personal, she must confront the brutal reality of the case and the hidden passions that are beginning to override her professional duty.

results.title: Kairos
results.overview: Documentary showing class of 2026 ‘Kairos’ last 10 days of the senior year.

results.title: Артефакты
results.overview: In ancient times, wizards fought each other for ancient artifacts that gave them power over the world. Many of them died in battle. And one of them, the Wizard, spent many centuries searching for the relics. In our days, schoolgirl Sonya accidentally discovers the artifacts, not knowing about their magical power. Without wanting it, the girl becomes a sorceress, not yet guessing what danger awaits her.

results.title: BINI: Walo Hanggang Disyerto
results.overview: ABS-CBN News’ entertainment reporter MJ Felipe follows BINI as the “Nation’s Girl Group” breaks new ground for P-Pop and makes history as the first all-Filipino act to perform at the iconic Coachella Valley Music and Arts Festival in California.  This news special gives an inside look at BINI's rehearsals and final preparations to their highly-anticipated Coachella debut and captures the challenges, expectations, and emotions surrounding this milestone moment.

results.title: Todos los caminos llevan a la Esperanza
results.original_title: Todos los caminos llevan a la Esperanza
results.overview: An intimate and collective documentary of a historic event that brought the devotion of Our Lady of Hope from Málaga to the heart of Rome for the Grand Procession held on May 17, 2025, during the Jubilee of 'Pilgrims of Hope'.  Different paths—personal, spiritual, and physical—converge on a single destination: Hope. An experience lived not only in the streets of Rome, but also in the hearts of those who participated, becoming a testament to faith.

results.title: Lucky
results.overview: When a down-on-her-luck bartender has a run-in with her abusive ex-boyfriend, their violent encounter may just be the start of her luck turning around.

results.title: The lovers
results.overview: A love lived like a dream leaves an indelible mark. Between grief and desire, a young woman confronts the fear of recognizing herself and discovering who she truly loves.

results.title: Turn Like Matter
results.overview: A bug birthed in the depths of an ecosystem is squished by a passing wander, causing the biosphere to shift out of balance.

results.title: Taghiyev: School
results.overview: August 1922. Jerry Thompson, filled with respect, prepares to hear Haji’s story. May 1901. Haji Zeynalabdin Taghiyev works on opening the first school for Muslim girls in Baku, with support from his wife Sona. Cleric Akhund Abu Ziyad opposes the idea, sparking public debate. Reformers — Hasan bey Zardabi, Alimardan bey Topchibashev, Ahmed bey Agaev, and progressive clergy led by Mirza Abuturab — support education. The conflict escalates to attacks on teachers. Haji changes strategy and sends a representative abroad. He returns with approvals from major Islamic centers, confirming girls’ right to education. Victory is Haji’s. In October 1901, the school opens.

results.title: My Themersons
results.overview: This film is a double portrait, or rather a triple one, as the extraordinary story of Franciszka and Stefan Themerson is told by the painter’s niece.

results.title: 200 G
results.overview: Prof. Franco Fossi thinks he can get away with drugs, shady business, and blackmailing students. He has no idea a brutal reality check is coming.

results.title: Hi, Linda
results.overview: A naughty young man who is lazy about worship is forced to go to church to comply with his parents' demands and his desire to get to know a female church servant who really hates his appearance.

results.title: The Bargain
results.overview: A young girl summons the Devil to get justice from her abusive foster father. The Devil is willing to make a deal but in Ruth’s desire for revenge exceeds her nerve. A chilling tale of revenge, religion and desperation in our lowest moments.

results.title: Scripted
results.overview: A farewell written in darkness.

results.title: It Happened
results.overview: Incapable of facing the loss of Pedro, Lucas and Mari dive in past memories. Remembering of happy moments, they discover that pain can, in the end, also mean longing.

results.title: Prick
results.overview: A young drug dealer turned addict must face his greatest fear – his estranged father.

results.title: Prithibi Bodle Geche
results.overview: An emotional story centered on a group of friends who embark on a trip to Cox's Bazar, where their shared experiences and deep conversations highlight the complexities of their interpersonal relationships. At the heart of the narrative is Ayan, whose struggle with past losses, feelings of loneliness, and deep connection to his grandmother create an poignant atmosphere throughout the journey. The story explores themes of personal growth, the pain of letting go, and the evolving nature of human bonds, capturing both the joy of friendship and the bittersweet reality of how lives and relationships can transform over time.

results.title: The Schmusical!
results.overview: The Schmus, a group of three friends, hangs out over the summer.

results.title: Will - Short Film
results.overview: After going through the dull motions of a non eventful day, a downhearted elderly man (William Harrold) finds joy in what matters most.

results.title: Josh's Deli
results.overview: A deli owner contends with his ham-fisted staff. Would it kill 'em to show gratitude every so often?

results.title: I Am Not My Body
results.overview: A film about queerness, wanting to be understood and needing to let go.

results.title: Greektown Wrestling 5.29.16
results.overview: Canada's rowdiest independent promotion is back to blow the roof off the building as Greektown Wrestling presents its massive May 29th blockbuster, streaming live and on-demand worldwide on TrillerTV+. Packed with deathmatch icons, international stars, and a highly anticipated war inside the steel structure, this event promises a classic, chaotic night of elite independent wrestling.

results.title: Banggay
results.overview: In a funeral where death and beauty come to life, a mortician's fortune turned with a knock on the door— he just didn't expect it to come with VIP corpses and moral decay.

results.title: Saigon Story: Two Shootings in the Forest Kingdom
results.original_title: Saigon Story: Two Shootings in the Forest Kingdom
results.overview: Which is more final, the gun or the camera? Armed with a powerful visual style, Oscar®-nominated filmmaker Kim Nguyen reveals the elusive connection between two families and one iconic photo: Saigon Execution. Part history, part mystery, Saigon Story confronts the family secrets left in the wake of the Vietnam War, exposing the resilience of survivors and the blurred legacy of wartime memory.

results.title: Ayman, Unscripted
results.overview: Not every experience leaves a trace, but some quietly change you, and you rarely know which until long after. Unscripted Ayman is a personal and reflective documentary that revisits one man's time in El Jadida, the people he met, the things he learned about himself, and the slow realization that meaning doesn't always show itself in the moment it's lived. It's a film about looking back and asking: was I simply passing through, or did it truly matter? A short poetic documentary by Framed in Marrakech. Watch here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Cs6tzfmi0rg&t=96s

results.title: Love the Dead
results.overview: One year after a zombie apocalypse, a mother and daughter are forced to choose between survival and family.

results.title: The Talented Mr. F
results.overview: This story sounds too crazy to be true, and yet it is. For three years, Berlin film students Julius and Moritz poured their hearts into their animated short Butty, hoping it would launch their careers. But when a festival disqualifies their film, they make a shocking discovery: Butty is already circulating online under the name of an American filmmaker. As they dig deeper, they uncover the unbelievable rise of a mysterious “Mr. F.”, a man hailed as the next Walt Disney who built his success on a stolen film and a web of lies.

results.title: Elsewhere
results.overview: Guided by an omniscient narrator, a time-traveller from the future travels back to the present in search of ghosts from the past.

results.title: For Love
results.overview: Flustered with his static life in love and career, a mid 30s man takes a chance at romance with an affable beau from Mexico City after putting himself aside for nearly a decade.

results.title: GCW: Express Lane 2026
results.overview: Game Changer Wrestling (GCW) presents Express Lane-a night of chaos, legends, and pure adrenaline.  Witness the unfiltered spirit of independent wrestling as GCW invades the East Coast for a card that bridges the gap between the pioneers and the provocateurs.  When GCW enters the "Express Lane," there are no speed limits and no looking back. Featuring some of the most dangerous names in the industry and a Hall of Fame legend, this event is designed to keep you on the edge of your seat.  Joey Janela vs Ken Dixon  VNDL48 (Atticus Cogar, Christian Napier & Otis Cogar) vs Don Freeze, Ricky Morton & Ruckus

results.title: The End
results.overview: A woman, a cigarette, a song, a memory.

results.title: CUANDO MUERES TE CONVIERTES EN UN SITIO PUSSY IN BIO
results.original_title: CUANDO MUERES TE CONVIERTES EN UN SITIO PUSSY IN BIO
results.overview: The world has ended but we haven't got the news yet. Moved by a desire for revenge, a filmmaker remembers some of the images he's posted on Twitter over the years. What he'll learn on the way —nothing— will chage him forever.

results.title: Сёрф Животное
results.overview: A group of girls sets off for a remote island to learn kitesurfing. They dream of soaring above the water like their instructors, strange, rude guys obsessed with the waves and wind. The boys aren't exactly thrilled about having to teach someone, but they need the money for a trip to Cape Verde. What is true kitesurfing—the joy of flight or the pain and humiliation? And what is freedom for the islanders—embracing their own path or escaping the big world?

results.title: Космическая Машка
results.overview: Masha spent her entire 11 years of life with her cosmonaut father at the spaceport. She knows how to fly a plane, a boat, and take responsibility for herself, but she doesn't know how her peers live. To make friends and get used to life on Earth, she goes to a regular school in St. Petersburg, where her incredible adventures begin.

results.title: Fruitless
results.overview: Oscar, an aspiring fashion designer, is faced with a painful decision following the events of a turbulent night..

results.title: Beyond Blue Sky: The Untold Story of the First Private Astronauts
results.original_title: Beyond Blue Sky: The Untold Story of the First Private Astronauts
results.overview: A supersonic physics experiment that would either end in a funeral or aerospace immortality for the desert-dwelling, corner-cutting geniuses, who wanted to prove it was possible to have a low-cost, privately-financed, manned space program.

results.title: Cupán Tae
results.overview: While tending bar, Ciarán is approached by Sean, confused by Sean's Irish, Ciarán realises he has fallen out of touch with his language. When he finds his father's old Irish notes, he takes this a sign to teach himself again, with his Irish improved, he finds himself a new job and feels more in touch with his culture and family than before

results.title: Will of the Kirin
results.overview: Kirin may be sick, but he refuses to slow down. As the day unfolds, one question remains... will it be his last?

results.title: Mother's Nature
results.overview: Mother's Nature is a series of vignettes with a playful twist on what it means to be a mom, whether you're a turtle, parrot or anything in between.

results.title: Dreamlink
results.overview: Jesse, a troubled teenager seeks solace in DreamLink, a revolutionary app merging dreams and reality that promises to connect them with the person they need the most.

results.title: Tsundoku
results.overview: An emotional hoarder since childhood, she has spent her life shelving the too big to handle emotions to process another day.  Every formative memory, from first crush to first messy heartbreak, are encapsulated in glowing orbs that she vomits, pickles, and tucks away on a shelf. She grows to realize that with each orb she puts away for safe keeping, she becomes more numb to her experiences. She has to lose nearly everything in order to realize there’s no way around but through.

results.title: The Language of the Sea
results.overview: After her brother goes missing, a young girl ventures out of the comfort of her home to find him. However, on her journey she befriends The Sea, which teaches her to speak its language and becomes a surrogate parent on her journey. However, things are not always as they seem.

results.title: Itlu Kanmani
results.overview: Itlu Kanmani follows Rohith, a young man who once dreamed of becoming a filmmaker but leaves everything behind to take care of his ailing father. After his father’s sudden death, Rohith discovers something unexpected that changes the way he sees his father  and his own life.  Haunted by unanswered questions and fragments of the past, Rohith begins a journey to understand a story that was never told to him. As hidden memories slowly unfold, he realizes that some dreams never truly disappear they only wait for the right person to continue them.  With the support of Chaitra, a compassionate doctor who becomes his emotional anchor, Rohith must decide whether to keep running from his past or face a truth that could change his future forever.  Itlu Kanmani is an emotional story about love, sacrifice, and a mystery hidden inside a father’s silent life.

results.title: Услышать
results.overview: Wanting to prove his worth, the arrogant old man decides to gain guardianship over his hearing-impaired granddaughter, despite his own illness and against the girl's wishes.

results.title: Verge
results.overview: Elena arrives home to discover a body neatly laid out on her living room floor. After her dog, Nanaya, begins speaking to her, the two discuss the strange occurrence and the mysterious pattern it ties into.
Two people meet and create a connection beyond spacetime.

results.title: Portrait In Red
results.overview: A mysterious guest arrives at a dinner party during a pivotal moment in an artist's career.

results.title: Sulle note di New York
results.overview: The new season of Ulisse opens on a musical note. Alberto Angela crosses the Atlantic to tell us about another city with a deep connection to music and its stories: we arrive in the Big Apple with To the Sound of New York. A sonic journey through the city where every stop is paired with a song or a great American artist.

results.title: Coin Operated Clown
results.overview: When a lonely and neglected wind up toy with a penchant for westerns begins to have doubts through their memories of time spent with a reclusive projectionist, They begin to question the unfair and one sided relationship they’re trapped in.  What lies beyond the cabin they call their home? Why must they answer to their partner? How does their favorite movie end? and what REALLY happened to their pet horse?  Despite these thoughts and memories of freedom, their partner, shilo is not about to let them go so easily.  But perhaps there’s more to her too than meets the button shaped eye.  Will they find the strength to turn their own key?  Roll up, Roll Up, because it's time to lift the curtain.  Starring Rebecca Hallows as the one and only Coin Operated Clown, Bijou Abas as Shilo, their lonely partner, and Aspen Thomas as The Reclusive Projectionist, Coin Operated Clown is a story of self worth our hearts can all tick in tune to.

results.title: I’ve Seen All I Need to See
results.original_title: I’ve Seen All I Need to See
results.overview: After the sudden and violent death of her estranged sister, an actor leaves Los Angeles and returns to her hometown in search of answers.

results.title: The Little Dominican House
results.overview: On March 27, 2026, ten students and two teachers set course for the Dominican Republic. Their mission? To change a family's future.

results.title: The Bone Bandits
results.overview: When two bandits break into a paleontology museum to steal a priceless fossil, they are unexpectedly aided by an overly dedicated historical re-enactor who mistakes them for museum employees.

results.title: Tickling the Devil
results.overview: Christopher Morris took part in 28 wars. Armed with a photographic camera, he documented bloody conflicts across the world. Today, he tries to lead a peaceful family life, but the demons of war continue to haunt him, and turbulent American reality calls out to him at every turn.

results.title: Filicide as a Means of Revenge Against a Partner
results.overview: A collection of interviews with several people who had experianced filicide commited by the hands of their partners, analyzing topics of lost love, the crime's psychologycal impact and asking the question of "Can a parent ever forgive the killer of their child?".

results.title: Sea Song
results.overview: The last remaining South Vietnamese naval officers reunite in California for what will likely be the final time, finding solace with the few people who understand the complexities that shape their life histories.

results.title: threeASFOUR: Full Circle
results.overview: Follows avant-garde NYC designers Gabi Asfour, Angela Donhauser, and Adi Gil and their singular "couture-on-the-street" designs; highlighting fashion as a radical act of collaboration shaped by war, identity, and hope.

results.title: PARANOIA
results.overview: In a series of recent home invasions, a teenage girl must fight her delusive suspicions when she is left home alone.

results.title: Only our song
results.overview: In a ruined village, Chamsae endures a precarious life while caring for his ailing mother, Geumja. When his cherished MP3 player breaks, his estranged sister Heeyeon returns with her friend Eunyeong. Despite her failing health, Geumja goes out to dance every day. After her final dance, Geumja passes away, and Chamsae finally leaves the village behind.

results.title: Se domani non torno
results.overview: It follows the tragic life of Giulia Cecchettin, starting from the private pain of her father, Gino Cecchettin, and culminating in a cinematic story that stems from the book of the victim's father, entitled Dear Giulia.

results.title: HABHAB: Kay Elise
results.overview: When clues and leads run out, A determined junior detective and her laid back prime detective partner take matters into their own hands and went back to the place where it all began, the place where a meek little girl disappeared into the forest never to be seen again.

results.title: 2/4 Heart
results.overview: Founded in 1962 in Aleksandrovac, central Serbia, the record label Diskos played a crucial role in shaping the country's popular folk music scene. Despite the label of "trash" or "lowbrow culture" imposed by republican cultural committees and the wider public, Diskos's music releases were sold in gold and diamond-certified circulation numbers, achieving great popularity among audiences.

results.title: Fantastique
results.overview: Fantastique is a magic-realistic coming-of-age in Guinea-Conakry. We follow the 14-year-old contortionist Fanta, who juggles between care for her ailing mother, school, and what she loves the most: Training with the acrobatic circus Amoukanama, with the hopes of joining their next big tour. Trying to bridge all expectations, Fanta starts to doubt what she really wants, searching for her own voice.

results.title: The Stop
results.overview: The city at night. A bus stop. A drunken man is dozing there. A young woman approaches. He asks her for help—to pour some cognac into his mouth. He cannot do it himself; his hands are occupied holding a grenade with a pulled pin—a weapon he came to possess purely by accident. The young woman calls the police. While waiting for help to arrive, a dialogue unfolds between them.

results.title: The Tales of Mission and Zaalbar
results.original_title: The Tales of Mission and Zaalbar

results.title: Dust to Malibu
results.overview: After turning his life around and following the death of his ex-wife, a father decides to make amends to the daughter he hasn't seen for almost eight years.

results.title: Walk the Cat
results.overview: Ben has a cat his landlord won't let him keep. Unfortunately, his landlord is at his house and he doesn't have a car. Ben and his feline friend must trek across rural Appalachia in search of her new home.

results.title: Ideal and Weird Family
results.overview: Daseon and Heesoo, a lesbian couple, decide to divorce. As their two children struggle to choose which mother to live with, the family sets out on an unexpected trip together.

results.title: Scorpion
results.overview: Amidst the rise of saffronisation among Indian youth, Saleel, a queer content creator works for the extremist Vinchu Sena party. When tasked with a destructive mission against an author, a mistaken target leads Saleel to confront his identity and society’s divisions.

results.title: Wandering
results.overview: Young children go on adventures. Sometimes their imaginations take them far from home, and then suddenly, out of the blue, a child finds themselves alone in an unfamiliar world, on an unfamiliar street, surrounded by strangers. That’s a problem. But it doesn’t just happen to children.

results.title: Liminality
results.overview: Liminality explores the concept of liminality — the state of being caught between two stages of life.  The story follows Toha, a young man struggling with work pressure, growing tensions with his closest friend, and uncertainty about his future. At the same time, he is haunted by recurring dreams that take two forms. Some are memories of a friend from his past, while others are visions of places he has never seen. In these visions, a mysterious blonde woman repeatedly appears, though her face remains hidden.  As reality and dreams begin to blur, Toha is drawn into a strange place that claims it can solve all of his problems. Faced with an opportunity to escape his struggles, he must confront the memories and choices that have kept him trapped between the past and the future.  A psychological drama with surreal elements, Liminality is a story about identity, change, and moving forward.

results.title: Echoes Between Land and Blue Sky: The Lives of Mongolian Deaf Nomads
results.original_title: Echoes Between Land and Blue Sky: The Lives of Mongolian Deaf Nomads
results.overview: Echoes Between Land and Blue Sky: The Lives of Mongolian Deaf Nomads documentary spotlights the lives of deaf herders in Mongolia, an overlooked community uniquely affected by climate change. Set against the backdrop of Mongolia’s breathtaking yet unforgiving landscapes, the film introduces herders who navigate the challenges of isolation, environmental shifts, and cultural preservation.  The documentary is structured into four acts, each focused on a different herder family, interconnected by overarching themes of climate resilience, cultural identity, and social inclusion.

results.title: Daughter of Nectar

This sculpture, both delicate and resilient, stands as a silent sentinel, mirroring the enduring struggles, suppressed voices, and profound cultural transformations of its homeland.
